name: Artichokes & Peas
recipeIngredient: Large basil leaves, sliced into strips
1 large Onion, white or yellow, sliced ¼-inch thick
1 cup Frozen peas, finely chopped parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the upper 2/3 of the leaves off the artichokes, then break off the remaining leaves at the base. Trim off dark green stems and cut the artichokes into quarters. Remove the fuzzy choke from each quarter and slice into pieces about ¼-to-½-inch thick.
2. Rub the cut surfaces with lemon juice and place them in a bowl covered with lemon juice and water.
3. Gently warm the olive oil with half the basil leaves in a pan.
4. Add the onions to the hot oil, then add the sliced artichokes. Season lightly and stir to coat with the oil.
5. Cook over medium-low heat until the water cooks off, adding more as needed (in ½-cup increments) until the artichokes are cooked through, about 25 minutes.
6. Add the peas and continue cooking until they are done.
7. Reduce any remaining liquid until syrupy and taste to season with salt.
8. Stir in the rest of the basil leaves, parsley, butter or olive oil, and a small amount of lemon juice or champagne vinegar for added brightness.
